meaning: n.(巴基斯坦、 印度等地冬末收获的) 早春作物
examples: Rabi Greenberg gifts Sophie a mezuzah.
Rabi Shalom Greenberg helps Sophie as she gives her speech in English and Hebrew.
The using of chirped laser pulse can restrain the Rabi oscillations and realize high efficiency of photoionization.
With seed aid and other forms of assistance, farmers have planted seeds for the Rabi season.
Rabi was interested in the properties of atomic nuclei, not clocks, and he never pursued the idea.
